libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Set native test runtime/system properties for the 5.0.1 generated tests: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. Meaningful coverage can use an in-process Vert.x HTTP server on 127.0.0.1 with ephemeral ports; no external HTTP service is required. Avoid POJO databind-specific WebClient coverage unless explicitly adding Jackson databind, because the core artifact path can cover JSON via JsonObject without extra dependencies.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The existing 5.0.0 scaffold applies the Netty/JDK 25 properties only when libraryVersion == '5.0.0', so a copied scaffold for 5.0.1 may still fail native runtime unless that condition is updated.
Optional OAuth2/databind features exist in the artifact surface but are not required for baseline meaningful coverage and may introduce extra dependency needs if selected by the generated tests.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency or Docker service is needed for meaningful Vert.x Web Client coverage, but the resolved 5.0.1 stack still uses Netty 4.2.x and needs the same JDK 25 native-run unsafe-access system properties already used for 5.0.0.
